steps.title: Identify the relationship to support
steps.content: The researcher claims higher latitude correlates with more ice days. Supporting data must show a higher-latitude lake with more ice days than a lower-latitude lake.

steps.title: Match the relationship to the data
steps.content:
The correct answer compares Näckten (higher latitude) to Lake Kegonsa (lower latitude) and shows Näckten had more ice days—exactly the pattern the researcher predicted.

The other choices either contradict this relationship or provide numbers without establishing the latitude-ice comparison.

That confirms D is correct.
